name: Creatie
description: AI-native product design tool combining UI design, prototyping, collaboration, and developer handoff in one platform. Positions as a Figma alternative with deeper generative AI integration.

seo.title: Creatie — Design Tools / Design-to-Code
seo.meta_description: Creatie: AI-native product design tool combining UI design, prototyping, collaboration, and developer handoff in one platform. Positions as a Figma alternative

when_to_use: AI-generated UI screen set iterated from a text brief
Figma-alternative prototyping with built-in developer handoff
Collaborative product design with real-time multiplayer editing
Design token export connecting design to code automatically
AI icon generation replacing manual icon search workflow

pros: Generative AI integrated deeper than Figma AI today
Combines design, prototyping, and handoff in one tool
Aggressive free tier to attract switchers
cons: Smaller community and plugin ecosystem than Figma
Migration cost from Figma is nontrivial
Long-term roadmap and funding less proven
review.verdict: Credible AI-forward Figma challenger for new projects, but ecosystem gap makes wholesale migration risky for established teams.
review.best_for: Solo designers and small teams starting fresh projects who want AI-native design workflows.
review.not_for: Established Figma teams with plugins, design systems, and training investments.

pricing.high_water_mark_reason: Freemium with no evidence of peak-lock

lock_in.reason: Proprietary design tool, exports to Figma
